task_completion.description: Create a curved path on the XY plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A curved line (e.g., BSpline, Bezier Curve, or Arc) should be visible in the 3D view, and its corresponding object should be listed in the Tree View.

task_completion.description: Create a vertical column object to be arrayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D vertical object (e.g., a Cylinder, Box, or extruded shape) representing a column should be visible in the 3D view and Tree View.

task_completion.description: Create a Path Array using the column and the curved path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'PathArray' object must be visible in the Tree View, indicating the Draft PathArray tool was used to link the column and the path.

task_completion.description: Distribute at least five columns along the path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Property View for the PathArray should show the 'Count' property set to 5 or greater, OR the 3D view should clearly show at least 5 column instances distributed along the curve.

task_completion.description: Align the columns to the curve's orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Property View for the PathArray should show the 'Align' property checked/set to 'true', OR the 3D view should show the columns rotating to match the tangent of the curve rather than all facing the exact same global direction.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file manager window should show the file saved as 'curved_colonnade.FCStd' in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with FreeCAD's toolbars, Tree View, Property View, and 3D viewport, rather than just executing a Python script in the terminal or FreeCAD macro console to bypass manual creation.

integrity.description: The agent created actual 3D geometry rather than empty objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport must display the actual curved path and the arrayed columns, not just renamed empty folders or dummy objects in the Tree View.

integrity.description: The agent used FreeCAD for the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface shown in the screenshots must be FreeCAD, identifiable by its layout, toolbenches (like Draft or Part), and icons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/curved_colonnade.FCStd'. The task requires using FreeCAD's Draft PathArray feature. To verify the array configuration, look for the 'DataCount' property (must be >= 5) and the 'DataAlign' property (must be True) in the FreeCAD Property View when the PathArray object is selected.
